title: TOWO Wooden Alphabet Puzzle for Toddlers- Chunky Size Peg Puzzle - Alphabet Board for Early Learning- Educational Toy for Baby Toddlers Montessori Learning
features: Bright abc puzzle with 26 chunky wooden alphabet letters in rainbow colours with inset corresponding pictures of animals, fruits and objects and their English names on a sturdy wooden board packed in a colourful box. Since our product first available in Amazon in 2016, many sellers has copied our design!

This large size wooden puzzle for babies with chunky size of the smooth wood letter makes it easy for little hands to handle and grasp then these letters with a pea sized peg. With beautiful packing box, this wooden alphabet puzzle is easy to be packed away and store. It measure 30.8 X 30.5 X 2.7 CM (12.13 x 12.01 X 0.83 Inches)

This wooden peg puzzle is suitable for 18 months plus. It is always advisable that an adult to supervise and enjoy the interaction of children with this toy. Great for wooden alphabet puzzle for toddlers as an aid to learning the alphabet, whilst developing recognition of colours and words , hand and eye co-ordination, enhancing the ability to match items up and increasing imagination

The letter puzzle was innovatively designed with the alphabet shapes slot with inset corresponding pictures on the board to make baby's first jigsaw puzzle is fun to learn and engage. This puzzle is the most original comparing with similar puzzles and is still the best wooden alphabet puzzle!

Safe and environmentally friendly: it is made of sustainable wood with environmentally friendly and non-toxic paints. It conforms to EC EN71, ASTM F963 and CPSIA toys safety Standards; being tested and certified by International Accredited Labs.
description: Product description Bright abc puzzle with 26 chunky wooden alphabet letters in rainbow colours with inset corresponding pictures of animals, fruits and objects and their English names on a sturdy wooden board packed in a colourful box. With beautiful packing box, this wooden alphabet puzzle is easy to be packed away and store. The chunky size and smooth wood is easy for little hands to handle. Toddlers like to hold these letters in hands. Match the alphabet with the same shape and size slots on the board. It is a good way to introduce preschool children to learn letters. "Toys of Wood Oxford" or "TOWO” is known for its fine quality, fun and educational multifunctional wooden toys. We make our wooden toys with pure love and care for our children and the environment. The wide range wooden toys include wooden puzzles, sorting toys, stacking toys, pull-along toys, educational and Montessori learning toys, matching toys, building and construction toys, family board games and wooden brain teaser puzzles etc. All of our products meet the criteria set by the EC Toy Safety Directive, CPSA Standards, tested and certified by International Accredited Labs. We pride ourselves on providing good quality products and first class customer service. We hope our products will bring lots of fun and enjoyment to your children and family. Directions Instructions on how to slot the letters into the board are provided.
